integration_validation_v2.gap: MT-143 artifact (kernel/role_mailbox_claim_lease.rs) is an in-memory struct/projection validator with NO clock or PG: no Utc::now, no sqlx, no INSERT/SELECT; lease_expired/lease_age_seconds/lease_state are caller-supplied fields. The cited test asserts hardcoded constants (lease_expired:true, lease_age_seconds:3900) it itself set — TTL/stale/conflict are never enforced against a managed resource.
integration_validation_v2.evidence: src/kernel/role_mailbox_claim_lease.rs (838 lines) has no Utc::now/sqlx/INSERT (grep empty); fields carried, not computed (:151,:334). tests/kernel_role_mailbox_claim_lease_tests.rs:16-30 assert constants from sample_controls() (:184 lease_expired:true hardcoded) with no DATABASE_URL/.pool(). The real PG TTL/conflict lease (LeaseManager, src/role_mailbox_v1/lease.rs, postgres_* conflict tests in role_mailbox_lease_tests.rs) is WP-KERNEL-004 MT-180, a different WP/MT, not this MT's cited surface.

minimum_controls: Use contract-first identity and preserve projection hash.
risks: Imported MT contract may under-capture prose-only review or proof instructions.

acceptance_criteria: MT-143 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Lease And Claim Contract -- Implement leases/claims for parallel model coordination with TTL
proof_targets: cargo test + runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger

scope.summary: MT-143 [Model-Workflow-Diagnostics] Lease And Claim Contract -- Implement leases/claims for parallel model coordination with TTL, stale state, conflict errors.
